title: Butler Breaks Ground on Safety and Transit Hub, Advancing Vision for a More Connected Campus and Community
summary_en: With clouds clearing and the sun making a late cameo appearance, Butler University officially broke ground on its new Safety and Transit Hub—marking a significant step forward in the institution’s long-term Gateway Project strategy and its commitment to strengthening both campus operations and community connectivity.  Faculty, staff, trustees, construction partners, and community members gathered
author: Mark Apple
title_cn: 巴特勒大学安全与交通枢纽项目破土动工 推进校园与社区更紧密互联互通愿景
